overview: Carol's Adventures is a story-driven pixel-art arcade game where Carol, an Akasa Air hostess, travels the world through 6 emotional levels to reunite with her boyfriend Joshua in Panama City. Features 3 fully playable mini-games, branching dialogue choices, checkpoint saves, and a dual ending system.
features: 3 fully playable arcade mini-games: turbulence dodge, passenger service, emergency landing
6 story levels from Kolkata to Panama City
Branching dialogue choices affecting the ending
Full checkpoint save system with world map progression
Dual endings based on relationship score
Synthwave pixel-art visuals with neon pink and blue palette
Portrait mobile layout optimized for Android
Interactive phone/text scenes with Joshua between levels
